title: Is your store's music driving customers out the door? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: Most retailers assume any music beats silence. The research disagrees. Mismatched music, and loud music, measurably shorten how long customers stay — and shorter visits mean smaller baskets.

schema.headline: Is your store's music driving customers out the door?
schema.description: How mismatched and overly loud music shortens dwell time and pushes customers to leave faster.
